price in 1e18 fixed-point. 1e18 \u2261 1.0."}},"title":"CohortLedger \u2014 on-chain Phase-1 ledger (EquiGen).","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Mirrors the responsibilities of `engine.ledger.CohortLedger` but         ONLY the execution bits: who joined, what they contributed, how         many PIUs they hold, what cohort they belong to.         All *actuarial* math (mortality tables, EPVs, annuity factors,         Monte Carlo) stays off-chain in Python. On-chain we need a         tamper-proof, append-only source of truth for membership and         contribution balances that other modules (FairnessGate,         LongevaPool, VestaRouter) can read.         PIU accrual: piusMinted = amount * 1e18 / piuPrice         Cohort bucket: (birthYear / 5) * 5 \u2014 same rule as Python.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/CohortLedger.sol":"CohortLedger"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/CohortLedger.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8faa48a036606c1117145d8800a612e5f80605780956e08f47d546de687d4c4f","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://c3b6987a3688dbee93590701d431520a51a541df621c5d45c424c11abb4de8c2","dweb:/ipfs/QmRTPjNFjfS7e2XRFw14jMjsc4cfBb6pXkBnNXzpdeKdiw"]},"src/interfaces/ICohortLedger.sol":{"keccak256":"0x2a813d50a07ac34e48f6b5b9a4772a20bffbe87ac123f88487f34af4262716c8","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://5fd514604bdc93006d1366b1389b564afd53b31ee1465249bb37ddcc9746f8cf","dweb:/ipfs/QmdHVV5qMjW3eJXCZ3XQm7pmyNkRH8khsCcMhgj2wkLU7y"]},"src/utils/Owned.sol":{"keccak256":"0x2109ff61a043c0743eb8655c47b684c453657be35a41b4f35944156463678d48","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8be6ddcfcca1103fb7d748b68086d54946e6a087da2c2d758d5297192b968f0b","dweb:/ipfs/Qme1HdBF1vT81ntD8PNT9dgy5JAQmSAKmvgjUufyr9YKf7"]},"src/utils/Roles.sol":{"keccak256":"0x2aa94822867486267b9c09f71bbd7f53111c0f1a764a9c55f19cd0b37c26d0ba","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://16a78e21e63a0ebee01d538d28dc66ef559876ac90c5dee1a246b3bddf538dd1","dweb:/ipfs/QmZeDnV5W1q1dXCG8fmG5ahDatfNW9bjNiP48D32etv9ux"]}},"version":1}
